case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $565.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF DONNELL WEAVER IS DENIED. PARAGRAPH 6 OF THE CLAIM STATES THAT THE MONEY SOUGHT TO BE FORFEITED IS MR. WEAVER'S MONEY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-02-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
AMENDED PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF DONNELL WEAVER; MEMO OF P & A; DEC AND POS FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR MAY-02-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
POS OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
ORDER DENYING PETITIONER'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF DONNELL WEAVER
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA WEAVER, DONNELL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,300.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT DONNELL WEAVER. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $565.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $565.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

Off Calendar May-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Donnell Weaver, claimant and opposing party in Pro Per, 415-685-6607

No other Appearance. The Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Claim Of Donnell Weaver is Denied. Paragraph 6 of the claim states that the money sought to be forfeited is Mr. Weaver's money. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
